html:
Exclusive to:

GenericLow powerOffBurningBurnt


Winona's Generator is a character-exclusive Structure craftable only by Winona in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter and requires one Trusty Tape, two Logs, and two Nitre to craft. It is used to power nearby Winona's Catapults and Winona's Spotlights.

When being placed, the generator will show a circular area where its effect will be active, with a smaller circle around the generator itself (preventing other structures from being built on top of it). Once placed, eligible structures can be "connected" to the generator simply by building it within its area of effect.

The generator can be refueled with Nitre for 50% full charge per Nitre. Once fueled, the generator cannot be turned off; it will keep running until it runs out of fuel.

A full Winona's Generator has a charge of 480 (1 day). Each connected structure drains 1 charge per second. If a structure is connected to multiple generators the drain is divided by the number of connected generators. The generator itself has a minimum drain of 0.075 charge per second.

The upgraded version of Winona's Generator is Winona's G.E.M.erator.

Portability

Winona with the "Portability" Insight skill can move her Generators by dismantling them and putting them into her inventory. Also, when crafting, it gives Winona's Generator as item.

Quick Charge

If Winona with "Quick Charge" skill placed Generator all gadgets to this generator recharge 100% faster.

Energy-Saver

If Winona with "Energy-Saver" skill placed Generator all gadgets from player with that skill will no longer consume energy while they're not in use.

Greater Generator

Generators placed by Winona with "Greater Generator I", "Greater Generator II" or "Greater Generator I" skill will make the efficiency (charge) of this Generators by 25% (Level I), 50% (Level II) or 100% (Level III).

Nightmare Generator

Winona with "Nightmare Generator" skill can use Nightmare Fuel to charge Winona's Generator.

Pure Horror Generator

Winona with "Pure Horror Generator" skill can use Pure Horror to charge Winona's Generator. Winona's Catapults charged by Pure Horror will deal 30 physical damage and 17 planar damage. Also it will deal +10% damage to Lunar Aligned.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Genteel Generator
Behold, the power of beauty!
Woven - Elegant
Jagged Generator
A brutish display of power.

Tips

  • Since Winona's generator cannot be turned off once built, it is ideal to store Nitre beside the generator for easy refueling. Note that Moleworms will consume any Nitre they are left on the floor.
  • Since the generator cannot be fueled in advance, it may be ideal to fuel it before leaving camp for short expeditions, in case one needs to retreat to base if attacked.

Trivia

  • Winona's Generator, alongside her other gadgets and the Engineering Tab, was introduced in her Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
  • During Rhymes With Play stream 228, one of the concepts shown was the generator taking form of a potato battery, although the game itself didn't have a Potato at the time.

Assets

GenericLow powerOffBurningBurnt
“Looks science-y. How does it work?”
–Wilson
“Iunno, it's Winona's junk.”
–Willow
“Thingamabob made by fixing lady.”
–Wolfgang
“It's a kind of electrical box.”
–Wendy
“OVERALLS IS NOW MY LEAST HATED MINION”
–WX-78
“An electrical power supply for her lovely inventions.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like Winona's work.”
–Woodie
“Where does she find the time to build all this.”
–Maxwell
“The tinkerer hath many tricks.”
–Wigfrid
“It feeds hungry machines.”
–Webber
“It's working really well!”
–Warly
“Friends made machine feeder”
–Wormwood
“That oughta do it.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu. Mortals don't know magic.”
–Wortox
“This box have weird colored branches sticking out.”
–Wurt
“A generator! Do you think she could make a radio too...?”
–Walter
“So this is one of those modern electrical thingies?”
–Wanda
“It's getting low on power.”
–Wilson
“It's on its last legs.”
–Willow
“Is supposed to look like that?”
–Wolfgang
“It's not long for this world.”
–Wendy
“DO NOT GIVE UP, BROTHER”
–WX-78
“Hm, her invention is starting to run down.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just aboot dead.”
–Woodie
“I think it's losing power.”
–Maxwell
“T'will nöt höld öut much lönger!”
–Wigfrid
“We think it's running low.”
–Webber
“It's getting a bit low, Winona.”
–Warly
“Getting tired”
–Wormwood
“Just about out of juice.”
–Winona
“Winding down, waning.”
–Wortox
“The little light getting lower...”
–Wurt
“I think we need to hook up a another generator to this generator.”
–Walter
“It's already losing steam? Clockwork is so much more reliable.”
–Wanda
“I could get it working, if Winona's busy.”
–Wilson
“Oops. It broke.”
–Willow
“Thingamabob is dead!”
–Wolfgang
“What did Winona put in it again? Oh...”
–Wendy
“NOOO”
–WX-78
“I'll grab the nitre, yes?”
–Wickerbottom
“Plum tuckered.”
–Woodie
“See? It wasn't so great after all.”
–Maxwell
“It hath löst its incredible pöwer!”
–Wigfrid
“Hey Winona! How do we fix it?”
–Webber
“I suppose it needs fuel.”
–Warly
“Not working”
–Wormwood
“Needs some more nitre.”
–Winona
“Playtime's over!”
–Wortox
“Think it asleep.”
–Wurt
“It stopped working.”
–Walter
“Did the electricity run out? Where do you get more?”
–Wanda
“It's on fire!”
–Wilson
“Hehehe!”
–Willow
“Is burning!”
–Wolfgang
“Oh no...”
–Wendy
“HURRY, SAVE IT”
–WX-78
“Oh dear, who did this?”
–Wickerbottom
“Woah! Careful, Lucy!”
–Woodie
“I'm going to pretend I don't see it.”
–Maxwell
“Tis engulfed in flame!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, oh!”
–Webber
“It, oh, it appears to be on fire.”
–Warly
“No fire! No!”
–Wormwood
“Quick! Put it out!”
–Winona
“Hoohoohoo!”
–Wortox
“Didn't do it!!”
–Wurt
“Ah!! That's how forest fires start!”
–Walter
“I probably should have warned her that was going to happen.”
–Wanda
“Science couldn't save it.”
–Wilson
“Well, that was mildly entertaining.”
–Willow
“Is all burned up.”
–Wolfgang
“It all crumbles to ash, in the end.”
–Wendy
“IT WAS A GOOD MACHINE”
–WX-78
“I do hope she'll build another.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a right shame.”
–Woodie
“Oh. What a pity.”
–Maxwell
“'Twas devöured by Hel's fire!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh no! It got burnt!”
–Webber
“Crisp, non?”
–Warly
“Fire hurt it”
–Wormwood
“Aw, nuts and bolts!”
–Winona
“How hilarious!”
–Wortox
“Weenowna-lady can build 'nother one, florp!”
–Wurt
“Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.”
–Walter
“I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...”
–Wanda
Winona's Generator is a character-exclusive Structure craftable only by Winona in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter and requires one Trusty Tape, two Logs, and two Nitre to craft. It is used to power nearby Winona's Catapults and Winona's Spotlights.
When being placed, the generator will show a circular area where its effect will be active, with a smaller circle around the generator itself (preventing other structures from being built on top of it). Once placed, eligible structures can be "connected" to the generator simply by building it within its area of effect.

A full Winona's Generator has a charge of 480 (1 day). Each connected structure drains 1 charge per second. If a structure is connected to multiple generators the drain is divided by the number of connected generators. The generator itself has a minimum drain of 0.075 charge per second.
The upgraded version of Winona's Generator is Winona's G.E.M.erator.
